summary: A globe-based radio station app where a 3D globe displays stations, with a black background matching the rest of the app. The currently playing station should always be visible/loaded on the globe.
architectural_notes: App uses a 3D globe to display radio stations; globe style should be preserved
App background is black; globe background must match
known_issues: Some stations (especially American ones) are missing from the globe display
Currently playing station may not load/appear on the globe

existing_features.title: Change the GlobeView and FullscreenGlobe component backgrounds from their current color to solid black (#000000) so the globe matches the rest of the app's dark background, while preserving all existing globe styling, markers, rings, and orbit controls.

Ensure the globe view loads and displays all available stations without missing entries. The currently playing station must always appear as a marker on the globe — if it is not already in the fetched globe station list, it must be added to the rendered markers regardless.

new_feature_requests.summary: Change globe background to black to match the rest of the app
Ensure all stations load on the globe, especially the currently playing station
